name: Claude 3.5 Sonnet (New)
note: Model id claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022, the corpus-confirmed gap: an upgraded revision of Claude 3.5 Sonnet released Oct 22 2024 (same price/speed as the June 2024 original) that introduced computer use (GUI automation: screenshots, cursor moves, clicks, typing) in public beta — the first frontier model to do so. Distinct from the June 2024 claude-3-5-sonnet-20240620 already in the corpus. Given the current corpus date frame (July 2026) this snapshot is now superseded/deprecated in Anthropic's lineup, though it was 'released' (not merely announced) at the time.

PROPOSED NEW SLUG 'osworld' (screenshot-only computer-use configuration; distinct from the newer 'osworld-verified' proposed elsewhere in this batch). Extended-steps configuration scored 22.0%.

Epoch AI FrontierMath Tiers 1-3 (v2, 300-problem set), 'Claude 3.5 Sonnet (Oct 2024)' entry = 2.0689654% (~6/300 problems). Sourced via Our World in Data's grapher, which cites Epoch AI's Benchmarking Hub. Not previously tracked for this model.
Humanity's Last Exam score of 4%, from Artificial Analysis's live per-model Intelligence Breakdown chart for 'Claude 3.5 Sonnet (Oct '24)'. Not previously tracked for this model.

GPQA Diamond score of 60%, from Artificial Analysis's independent re-evaluation (live per-model Intelligence Breakdown chart for 'Claude 3.5 Sonnet (Oct '24)'). This is a genuinely distinct data point from the already-tracked self-reported 65% (Anthropic's own 0-shot CoT Model Card Addendum figure) -- AA's harness/prompting differs and produced a ~5-point-lower score, consistent with the commonly observed self-reported-vs-independent GPQA gap. Added as an additional 'gpqa' entry under source=independent (corpus already has precedent for multiple entries under one slug distinguished by source, e.g. deepseek-v3-0324.json).

Live Text Arena leaderboard, model row 'claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022', Elo 1373 (rank 158/374, 88,321 votes) as of the Jul 13, 2026 snapshot fetched directly from arena.ai. Not previously tracked for this model.
